_meta.primary_mechanism: The SC is PARSED from the HTML_CodeSniffer code itself. Codes look like 'WCAG2AAA.Principle1.Guideline1_4.1_4_6.G18.Fail' — the token '1_4_6' is the success criterion (-> 1.4.6). The normalizer extracts it with a regex; this file only holds overrides for codes that don't follow the pattern.
_meta.note: Keys starting with '_' are ignored. Pa11y/HTML_CodeSniffer is our main source of automated AAA (WCAG2AAA standard) checks.
